2606.29067.title: ThinkProbe: Beyond Accuracy -- Structural Profiling of Open-Ended LLM Reasoning Traces via Non-Generative Thought Graphs
2606.29067.paper_summary: We present ThinkProbe, a framework for structural analysis of LLM reasoning traces. ThinkProbe converts each trace into a Thought Graph a directed graph with cycles, 8 node types, and 6 edge types and derives a 19-metric five-dimensional cognitive profile (5D-CP: Breadth, Depth, Structure, Metacognitive, Efficiency) through a fully non-generative pipeline combining rule-based segmentation and discriminative semantic linking. Applied to 4{,}200 traces from 7 native reasoning models across 200 open-ended questions and 10 cognitive domains, ThinkProbe reveals that reasoning structure is a stable, model-level property: between-model variance exceeds between-domain variance by up to fourfold across four of five cognitive dimensions, with Structure showing genuine sensitivity to question domain, exposing qualitatively distinct cognitive profiles invisible to accuracy-based evaluation.
2606.29067.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 ThinkProbe，一個用於 LLM 推理痕跡結構分析的框架。<lb/>ThinkProbe 將每個痕跡轉換為一個思維圖，這是一個具有循環的有向圖，包含 8 種節點類型和 6 種邊類型，並通過一個完全非生成的流程推導出 19 個指標的五維認知檔案 (5D-CP: 廣度、深度、結構、元認知、效率)，該流程結合了基於規則的分段和區分語義鏈接。<lb/>應用於來自 7 個本地推理模型的 4,200 個痕跡，涵蓋 200 個開放式問題和 10 個認知領域，ThinkProbe 顯示推理結構是一種穩定的模型級屬性：在五個認知維度中的四個維度中，模型間的變異性超過領域間的變異性，最多可達四倍，結構對問題領域顯示出真正的敏感性，揭示出質量上不同的認知檔案，這些檔案在基於準確性的評估中是不可見的。
2606.29067.author: Mohamed Amine Kerkouri et.al.
2606.29067.authors: Mohamed Amine Kerkouri, Simon D. Hernandez, Marouane Tliba, Yann Dauxais, Maha Ben-Fares, Pierre Holat
